steps: S8 KEYWORD DETECT: 'burst water main','not surface flooding','No rescue needed' -> no standard keyword match. Field report reclassifies G-10 event to infrastructure_failure (water_main_burst).
G-10/infrastructure_failure (new): S8=0.85x1.0=0.85. source_types=[field_report]=1. NOT corroborated. credibility=0.85

OVERRIDE RULE: field_report (credibility=0.85) with explicit contradiction of urban_flood classification overrides fused social+weather+traffic signals (credibility=0.78). G-10 event reclassified. urban_flood group DISSOLVED.

fused_signals.override_note: field_report explicitly contradicts urban_flood. Original social+weather+traffic signals misidentified burst water main as surface flooding.

steps: ISB-001 RETRACTED: G-10/urban_flood classification dissolved by field report override.

G-10/infrastructure_failure: credibility=0.85>=0.60 -> CRISIS (reclassified). Severity: base=4 (infrastructure analog), bonus(G-10)=+1, penalty(0.85>=0.70)=0, severity=5. Radius=1.5km (power_outage analog). field_report says No rescue needed.
ISB-001 reclassified as water_main_burst at severity 5 (down from urban_flood severity 8).
ISB-002 Murree Road: still MONITORING at 0.575.
CASCADE for infrastructure_failure: ['Water supply disruption to G-10 residents','Road surface damage risk at G-10/2','IESCO crew required to verify electrical safety']

cascade_effects: Water supply disruption to G-10 residents
Road surface damage risk at G-10/2
IESCO crew required to verify electrical safety
crises.reclassification_reason: field_report S8: burst water main confirmed, no surface flooding, no rescue needed

steps: ISB-001 RECLASSIFIED: severity dropped 8->5. urban_flood resource allocation retracted.
WITHDRAW: 2 rescue_teams recalled (field report: no rescue needed). 1 ambulance stood down.
RETAIN: 1 ambulance on standby. 2 police units for road management at G-10/2 burst site.
DISPATCH: IESCO utility crew to G-10/2 (handled via stakeholder message, not resource pool).
POOL AFTER RETRACTION: ambulances=3, rescue_teams=3, police_units=3, medical_vans=2
RETRACTION MESSAGE generated for all stakeholders.
TRADE-OFF LOG: Resources freed from ISB-001 flood response (priority 64.0->25.0 post-reclassify). Held in reserve pending ISB-002 escalation.

actions.description: Recall 2 rescue teams from G-10/2 — burst pipe confirmed, no flood rescue needed
actions.state_change: Rescue team icons animate back to base; orange pulse overlay removed; green 'Resolved' tag on G-10

actions.description: Stand down 1 ambulance — field report confirms no casualties
actions.state_change: One ambulance icon returns to base; crisis marker downgrades from red to orange

actions.description: Retain 2 police units at G-10/2 for road surface hazard management
actions.state_change: Police icons remain at G-10/2; label changes to 'Road Hazard Control'

actions.description: Dispatch IESCO utility crew to G-10/2 to isolate water main and assess electrical safety
actions.state_change: Utility crew icon appears at G-10/2; sector overlay changes to 'Infrastructure Response'

actions.description: Issue flood alert retraction to G-10 residents
actions.state_change: Amber alert zone clears; green 'All Clear — No Flood' notification dispatched to 2.5km radius

stakeholder_messages.public_english: UPDATE: The G-10 flooding report has been corrected. On-site inspection confirms a burst water main at G-10/2, NOT surface flooding. No evacuation required. IESCO and utility crews are on site.
stakeholder_messages.public_urdu: اپ ڈیٹ: G-10 سیلاب کی اطلاع غلط تھی۔ G-10/2 میں پانی کا پائپ پھٹا ہے، نہ کہ سیلاب۔ انخلاء ضروری نہیں۔ متعلقہ ٹیمیں موجود ہیں۔
stakeholder_messages.pims_hospital: RETRACTION: G-10 urban_flood alert cancelled. Burst water main confirmed — no mass casualties expected. Stand down trauma beds. Monitor for minor injuries only.
stakeholder_messages.traffic_authority: UPDATE: G-10/2 road closure due to burst water main (NOT flood). Maintain road block at G-10/2 junction. Srinagar Highway diversion remains active until pipe repair complete.
stakeholder_messages.iesco_utility: URGENT: Burst water main at G-10/2 confirmed by field report. Dispatch crew immediately to assess electrical safety in affected zone. Water supply isolation required.
stakeholder_messages.media_command: CORRECTION — Incident ID #ISB-001. Reclassified: urban_flood -> infrastructure_failure (water_main_burst). Severity: 5/10. Confidence: 0.85. Rescue teams stood down. IESCO response active. No casualties.

retracted_alerts: PIMS Hospital flood trauma alert — CANCELLED
pending_alerts: G-10 burst water main public correction notice sent
IESCO utility crew dispatched to G-10/2
Srinagar Highway partial closure maintained for pipe repair
